mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, diagnosis_id, state_id, round, alert_type, hypotheses_json, steps_json, required_tools_json, expected_evidence_json, risk_level, budget_json, plan_json, planner_type, create_time, update_time FROM ops_investigation_plan WHERE diagnosis_id = #{diagnosisId} ORDER BY round DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
